title: Goals, Context, Outputs, Boundaries, and Done Conditions
description: Write a production-ready prompt for a high-impact code and document change. Learners cumulatively produce a reusable goal-context-output-boundary template through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: State the desired result and audience before prescribing implementation steps.
Provide context that can change the result and route the agent to authoritative sources.
Specify output structure, granularity, evidence, and machine-readable constraints when they matter.
